zh.Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾斯托普特
zh.Davenport, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾達文波特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Jenkin Davenport於大約1325年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough43歲，母親Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough31歲。他於大約1344年與Elizabeth de Leigh在英國英格蘭爾貝頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1384年被列為justice of lancaster。他去世於1390年11月13日在英國爾亨波瑞享年66歲，埋葬在英國爾亨波瑞。

zh-hans.Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾斯托普特
zh-hans.Davenport, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾達文波特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Jenkin Davenport于大约1325年出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough43岁，母亲Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough31岁。他于大约1344年与Elizabeth de Leigh在英国英格兰爾貝頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1384年被列为justice of lancaster。他去世于1390年11月13日在英国爾亨波瑞享年66岁，埋葬在英国爾亨波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Jenkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Jankin. This was a pet form of the boy's name Jan , with the diminutive suffix -kin. The modern given name is popular in Wales, where the surnames Jenkin and Jenkins are common.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Jenkin Davenport was born about 1325, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough, was 43 and his mother, Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough, was 31. He married Elizabeth de Leigh about 1344, in Bechton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1384, at the age of 60, his occupation is listed as justice of lancaster. He died on 13 November 1390, in Henbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Henbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Jenkin Davenport est né environ 1325, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Leigh environ 1344, à Bechton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1384, à l’âge de 60 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of lancaster. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1390, à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Jenkin Davenport um 1325 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough 43 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough 31. Er hat um 1344 in Bechton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1384, als er 60 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of lancaster aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. November 1390 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Henbury, Cheshire, England und wurde in Henbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Jenkin Davenport è nato il circa 1325 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Leigh circa 1344, nel Bechton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1384, all'età di 60 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of lancaster. Morì il 13 novembre 1390, nel Henbury, Cheshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Henbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Jenkin Davenportが約1325年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Davenport Of Wheltroughは43歳，母Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitroughは31歳であった。約1344年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアベチトンでElizabeth de Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1384年，60歳の時，職業はjustice of lancasterと記録されている。彼は1390年11月13日にイギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーで66歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Jenkin Davenport(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 베ch턴에서 Elizabeth de Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1384년, 60세의 나이로 그의 직업은 justice of lancaster이었다. 그는 1390년 11월 13일 영국 체실르 헨버이에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 헨버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Jenkin Davenport nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Leigh aproximadamente 1344, em Bechton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1384, com 60 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of lancaster. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1390, em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Jenkin Davenport родился около 1325 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Leigh около 1344 г. в местности бечтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1384 году, в возрасте 60 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of lancaster. Он умер 13 ноября 1390 г. в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Jenkin Davenport nació aproximadamente 1325, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Leigh aproximadamente 1344, en Bechton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1384, a la edad de 60 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of lancaster. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1390, en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
